title: Software Update - DFU - Incoming mobile phone call during update
scenario: Firmware update (DFU) continues or completes successfully when an incoming mobile phone call is received and answered during the update process
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) on the connected Poly device.
5. While the firmware update is in progress, have an incoming mobile phone call arrive on the Android device.
6. Answer the incoming call on the Android device.
7. Monitor the firmware update progress in the Poly Studio Mobile app during and after the call.
8. End the call and check the firmware update status in the app.
expected: The firmware update continues running or completes successfully without interruption, error, or failure. The Poly Studio Mobile app shows the update progressing or completed after the call ends.
